corrections.correct: 1 Τέκνον, εἰ προσέρχῃ δουλεύειν Κυρίῳ θεῷ,

corrections.current: καὶ οὐ μὴ πταίσῃ ὁ μισθὸς ὑμῶν.
corrections.correct: καὶ οὐ μὴ πταίσῃ ὁ μισθὸς αὐτῶν.
corrections.note: Printed text reads αὐτῶν, not ὑμῶν.
Asterisk after ℵ is present in the apparatus.

corrections.correct:

uncertain.note: The added reading after ελεους] is difficult; transcription may already be correct, but the first word looks unusual and could merit later verification from another scan.
Need caution on superscript forms in Bᵃ/B* and the exact placement of brackets around εγκατελειφθη variants.

notes: Running head and body largely match. Duplicate parenthetical verse numbers in body reflect marginal line numbers/verse markers as transcribed and were not corrected unless clearly wrong. Apparatus contains a few small siglum/letter issues.
